basic_details.job_title: CAIR DRDO Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics (CAIR DRDO)
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics (CAIR DRDO) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the CAIR DRDO JRF Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for 03 years for OBC and 05 years for SC/ST/PH candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech in Computer Science/Computer Engineering in 1st Division with valid CSIR-UGC NET/GATE qualification
qualification.details: Graduate degree in professional course (B.E./ B.Tech) in Computer Science/ Computer Engineering in 1st Division from AICTE accredited Institute/ University with valid CSIR-UGC (NET)/GATE qualification OR Post Graduate degree in professional course (ME/ M.Tech) in Computer Science/ Computer Engineering in 1st Division at both Graduate & Post Graduate level and both from AICTE accredited Institute/ University.

selection_process: Document Verification Written Test Interview Merit List

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CAIR DRDO JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the application form by e-mail is 26 June 2026. However, the walk-in interview is scheduled for 04 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech in Computer Science/Computer Engineering in 1st Division with a valid CSIR-UGC NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years, with relaxations applicable for OBC, SC, ST, and PH candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a Walk-in recruitment. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents on the specified date and venue.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the CAIR DRDO JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, a Written Test, and an Interview, followed by the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics (CAIR DRDO), Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CAIR/HRT/JRF/2026/01.
